RUFAS.routines.feed_storage package

Submodules

RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.baleage module

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.baleage.Baleage

Bases: Storage

Class representing Baleage storage, a subclass of Storage.

Attributes

bale_densityfloat

Density of the bale, calculated based on the dry matter.

Methods

calculate_protein_loss():

Calculates the protein loss specific to Baleage storage.

calculate_protein_loss() → None

Calculate the protein loss specific to Baleage storage.

Returns

None

RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.grain module

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.grain.Dry

Bases: Grain

Represents dry grain storage and manages its specific attributes and behaviors.

Inherits from Grain.

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.grain.Grain

Bases: Storage

Represents grain storage and manages its specific attributes and behaviors.

Inherits from Storage.

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.grain.HighMoisture

Bases: Grain

Represents high-moisture grain storage and manages its specific attributes and behaviors.

Inherits from Grain.

RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.harvested_crop module

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.harvested_crop.CropCategory(value)

Bases: Enum

Enum for Crop Categories.

Attributes:

SMALL_GRAIN: Represents small grain crops. CORN: Represents corn crops. SOY: Represents soy crops. GRASS: Represents grass crops. ALFALFA: Represents alfalfa crops.

ALFALFA = 'Alfalfa'
CORN = 'Corn'
GRASS = 'Grass'
SMALL_GRAIN = 'Small grain'
SOY = 'Soy'
class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.harvested_crop.CropType(value)

Bases: Enum

Enum for subdivisions of Crop Categories.

Attributes:

WHEAT: Type of Small Grain. RYE: Type of Small Grain. OAT: Type of Small Grain. RICE: Type of Small Grain. HIGH_MOISTURE: Type of Corn. SILAGE: Type of Corn. WHOLE_PLANT: Type of Corn. GRAIN: Type of Corn or Soy. FORAGE: Type of Soy. ALFALFA: Type of Alfalfa. RYEGRASS: Type of Grass. ORCHARDGRASS: Type of Grass. FINE_FESCUE: Type of Grass. TALL_FESCUE: Type of Grass. MEADOW_FESCUE: Type of Grass.

ALFALFA = 'Alfalfa'
FINE_FESCUE = 'Fine Fescue'
FORAGE = 'Forage'
GRAIN = 'Grain'
HIGH_MOISTURE = 'High-moisture'
MEADOW_FESCUE = 'Meadow Fescue'
OAT = 'Oat'
ORCHARDGRASS = 'Orchardgrass'
RICE = 'Rice'
RYE = 'Rye'
RYEGRASS = 'Ryegrass'
SILAGE = 'Silage'
TALL_FESCUE = 'Tall Fescue'
WHEAT = 'Wheat'
WHOLE_PLANT = 'Whole-plant'
class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.harvested_crop.HarvestedCrop(category: CropCategory, type: CropType, harvest_time: Time, storage_time: Time, fresh_mass: float, dry_matter_percentage: float, dry_matter_digestibility: float, crude_protein_percent: float, non_protein_nitrogen: float, starch: float, adf: float, ndf: float, lignin: float, sugar: float, ash: float)

Bases: object

A class to represent a harvested crop with its attributes.

Attributes

categoryCropCategory

The category of the crop (enum).

typeCropType

The type of the crop (enum), a subdivision of crop category.

harvest_timeTime

The time at which the crop was harvested

storage_timeTime

The time at which the crop was stored

fresh_massfloat

The fresh mass of the crop in kg.

dry_matter_percentagefloat

Percent of mass that is not water.

dry_matter_digestibilityfloat

Percent of mass that is digestible.

crude_protein_percentfloat

Percent of mass that is dietary crude protein.

non_protein_nitrogenfloat

Percent of mass that is non-protein nitrogen.

starchfloat

Percent of mass that is starch.

adffloat

Percent of mass that is acid detergent fiber.

ndffloat

Percent of mass that is neutral detergent fiber.

ligninfloat

Percent of mass that is lignin.

sugarfloat

Percent of mass that is labile carbohydrate.

ashfloat

Percent of mass that is ash.

Methods

__post_init__():

Validates the category and type relationship.

adf: float
ash: float
category: CropCategory
crude_protein_percent: float
dry_matter_digestibility: float
dry_matter_percentage: float
fresh_mass: float
harvest_time: Time
lignin: float
ndf: float
non_protein_nitrogen: float
starch: float
storage_time: Time
sugar: float
type: CropType

RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.hay module

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.hay.Hay

Bases: Storage

Represents a Hay storage subclass of Storage.

Attributes

bale_densityfloat

Density of the hay bale calculated based on its moisture content.

bale_sizefloat

Diameter of the hay bale in meters.

Methods

calculate_protein_loss():

Calculates the protein loss in the hay.

property bale_density: float

Calculate and return the density of the hay bale.

Returns

float

The density of the hay bale.

property bale_size: float

Return the size (diameter) of the hay bale.

Returns

float

The diameter of the hay bale in meters.

calculate_protein_loss()

Calculates the protein loss in the hay.

Returns

None

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.hay.ProtectedIndoors

Bases: Hay

Represents protected indoors hay storage, a subclass of Hay.

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.hay.ProtectedTarped

Bases: Hay

Represents protected tarped hay storage, a subclass of Hay.

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.hay.ProtectedWrapped

Bases: Hay

Represents protected wrapped hay storage, a subclass of Hay.

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.hay.Unprotected

Bases: Hay

Represents unprotected hay storage, a subclass of Hay.

RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.sileage module

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.sileage.Bag(bag_size: int | None = None)

Bases: Sileage

Class representing the Bag type of Sileage storage.

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.sileage.Bunker(bunker_size: str | None = None)

Bases: Sileage

Class representing the Bunker type of Sileage storage.

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.sileage.Pile(pile_size: str | None = None)

Bases: Sileage

Class representing the Pile type of Sileage storage.

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.sileage.Sileage

Bases: Storage

Class representing the Sileage storage type, inheriting from Storage.

Methods are placeholders as per the design document and are to be implemented.

calculate_dry_matter_loss_to_effluent(dry_matter: float, estimated_maximum_effluent: float, time_in_silo: int) → float

Calculates the dry matter loss to effluent, specific to Sileage.

Parameters

dry_matterfloat

The amount of dry matter.

estimated_maximum_effluentfloat

The estimated maximum effluent.

time_in_siloint

Time in days the crop has been in the silo.

Returns

float

The amount of dry matter lost to effluent, specific to Sileage.

calculate_dry_matter_loss_to_gas(dry_matter: float, time_in_silo: int) → float

Calculates the dry matter loss to gas, specific to Sileage.

Parameters

dry_matterfloat

The amount of dry matter.

time_in_siloint

Time in days the crop has been in the silo.

Returns

float

The amount of dry matter lost to gas, specific to Sileage.

calculate_protein_loss()

Placeholder method to calculate protein loss specific to Sileage.

Returns

None

RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.storage module

class RUFAS.routines.feed_storage.storage.Storage

Bases: object

Abstract class representing a general storage structure.

Attributes

storedList[HarvestedCrop]

A list of HarvestedCrop objects representing the crops stored.

capacityfloat

The maximum capacity of the storage, currently set to infinity.

Methods

receive_crop(crop: HarvestedCrop)

Receives a harvested crop and adds it to the storage.

process_degradations()

Processes the degradations and losses of the stored crops.

give_feed(amount: float, crop_type: str)

Gives out a specified amount of feed of a certain crop type.

calculate_dry_matter_loss_to_gas(dry_matter: float, time_in_silo: int)

Calculates the dry matter loss to gas.

calculate_dry_matter_loss_to_effluent(dry_matter: float, estimated_maximum_effluent: float, time_in_silo: int)

Calculates the dry matter loss to effluent.

calculate_protein_degradation()

Calculates protein degradation.

calculate_heat_generated()

Calculates the total sensible heat generated.

calculate_bale_density(initial_dry_matter: float)

Calculates the density of a bale.

recalculate_nutrient_fractions()

Recalculates the relative nutrient concentrations after dry matter loss.

calculate_bale_density(initial_dry_matter: float) → float

Calculates the density of a bale.

Parameters

initial_dry_matterfloat

The initial dry matter of the bale.

Returns

float

The density of the bale.

calculate_dry_matter_loss_to_effluent(dry_matter: float, estimated_maximum_effluent: float, time_in_silo: int)

Calculates the dry matter loss to effluent.

Parameters

dry_matterfloat

The amount of dry matter.

estimated_maximum_effluentfloat

The estimated maximum effluent.

time_in_siloint

Time in days the crop has been in the silo.

Returns

float

The amount of dry matter lost to effluent.

calculate_dry_matter_loss_to_gas(dry_matter: float, time_in_silo: int) → float

Calculates the dry matter loss to gas.

Parameters

dry_matterfloat

The amount of dry matter.

time_in_siloint

Time in days the crop has been in the silo.

Returns

float

The amount of dry matter lost to gas.

calculate_heat_generated() → float

Calculates the total sensible heat generated.

Returns

float

The total sensible heat generated in kJ/kg.

calculate_protein_degradation()

Calculates protein degradation.

Returns

None

give_feed(amount: float, crop_type: CropType)

Gives out a specified amount of feed of a certain crop type.

Parameters

amountfloat

The amount of feed to give out.

crop_typeCropType

The type of crop to give out.

Returns

None

process_degradations()

Processes the degradations and losses of the stored crops.

Returns

None

recalculate_nutrient_fractions()

Recalculates the relative nutrient concentrations after dry matter loss.

Returns

None

receive_crop(crop: HarvestedCrop) → None

Receives a harvested crop and adds it to the storage.

Parameters

cropHarvestedCrop

The harvested crop to be added to the storage.

Returns

None
